{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Jin Amon
| aliases = Amon
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|purple foxfire}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|blood grandson of the Patriarch}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, grandson of the Wei clan Patriarch}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei clan]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Wei Jin Amon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Wei Jin Amon, also known as Amon, is a seventeen-year-old member of the [[Wei clan]] and the blood grandson of the clan's Patriarch, [[Wei Jin Sairus]]. An [[Iron]]-stage practitioner, he is characterized by his long, thick black hair and his use of a spear, which he often carries wrapped in green shadesilk. During a formal challenge in an arena, Amon represented his clan against Wei Shi [[Lindon]] in an attempt to demonstrate his value and secure a position within the [[Heaven's Glory]] School. Although he displayed significant speed and skill, including the ability to move great distances in a single step with foxfire trailing his weapon, he ultimately lost the engagement. Following an assault by [[Lindon]] and the [[Remnants]], Amon was forced to admit defeat. In later observations, he was seen maintaining a proud demeanor and reassuring other [[Iron]]-stage practitioners regarding his grandfather's leadership.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|As a blood grandson of the Patriarch, Wei Jin Amon is a member of the [[Wei clan]] who serves as a potential combatant for [[Kelsa]]. During battle, he wields a spear and utilizes purple foxfire, marked by the possession of an iron badge. He was once seen crouched with his weapon ready for combat, though he eventually sustained injuries. Ultimately, Amon suffered defeat at the hands of the hornet Remnants.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] is someone [[Kelsa]] might fight.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] is the blood grandson of the Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] uses a spear.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] has an iron badge.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] uses purple foxfire.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] was crouched with a spear ready for battle.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]] is a member of the [[Wei clan]] who was injured.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Amon was defeated by the hornet Remnants.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wei Jin Amon]]'s grandfather is a member of the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Amon is the grandson of the [[Wei clan]] Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Wei clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
